Score
I_CAHPS_SCORE_RATE Include CAHPS RATE in Quality Composite Indicator for whether CAHPS RATE is included in Quality Composite Score 1437 Num 8 Equals 1 if CAHPS RATE measure is included in the Quality Composite Score
I_CAHPS_SCORE_RESO Include CAHPS RESO in Quality Composite Indicator for whether CAHPS RESO is included in Quality Composite Score 1438 Num 8 Equals 1 if CAHPS RESO measure is included in the Quality Composite Score
I_CAHPS_SCORE_SPEC Include CAHPS SPEC in Quality Composite
